Our Formula

Powerful Clean,
Gentle on Hands

HOPE's specially formulated liquid detergents cut through the toughest stains while remaining gentle on your skin and fabrics. Made for Ethiopian families.

Deep Clean Formula Penetrates fabric fibers to lift dirt and stains completely

Our Products

Find the Right HOPE for You

From handwashing to heavy laundry — we have the right product for every cleaning need in your home.

Handwash
HOPE Hand Wash Liquid

Gentle antibacterial liquid soap with a refreshing scent. Perfect for everyday handwashing — leaves skin soft and clean.

200–500 ETB Pump bottle

Cloth Wash
HOPE Cloth Wash Liquid

Powerful formula specially designed for fabric care. Removes tough stains from clothes while keeping colors bright and fabrics soft.

200–500 ETB Squeeze bottle
Order →
Laundry & Dishes
HOPE Multi-Use Detergent

Available in 2L and 5L jerry cans. A versatile powerhouse — removes tough stains from fabrics and cuts through grease on dishes. One product, two uses.

300–1000 ETB 2L & 5L sizes

Why Choose Us

The HOPE Difference

💪

Tough on Stains

Our advanced formula tackles the toughest stains — grass, mud, oil — in a single wash without damaging your fabrics.

🌿

Skin-Safe Formula

Gentle on hands and skin even with daily use. No harsh chemicals that dry or irritate — safe for the whole family.

💰

Affordable Prices

Quality cleaning shouldn't cost a fortune. HOPE gives every Ethiopian family access to excellent hygiene products.

🚚

Fast Local Delivery

Based right here in Addis Ababa — we deliver quickly and reliably to homes and businesses across the city.
